{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Nakothi's island
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi's island]] is where [[Shera]]'s [[Consultant]] friend defended her.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c27">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Nakothi's island]] is where the [[Watchmen]] were faced down.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
